personal.name: Qaiss Abdelhamid
personal.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
personal.subtitle: Angular Specialist · AI-Augmented Developer
personal.tagline: I ship production-grade software faster than anyone else — combining deep frontend expertise with strategic AI orchestration.
personal.bio: Senior Fullstack Engineer with 5+ years building scalable web platforms and mobile applications. Angular specialist, TypeScript purist, and AI-augmented developer who ships clean, maintainable code on time — every time. I work independently in Agile teams, communicate clearly with clients, and bring a product mindset to every engagement. Fluent in English, French, and Arabic.

achievements.label: // 03 Impact & Numbers
achievements.description: Every number represents a real project, a real team, and a real problem solved.

timeline.description: Drag or scroll to explore — fullstack engineering across web and mobile.

highlights: Built Elivret & Passeport Maroc products using Angular 17 with advanced state management
Implemented OnPush change detection strategy reducing re-render cycles by 40%
Architected NgRx store patterns adopted as team standard across 3 squads
Led frontend technical reviews and established coding standards documentation
Developed fullstack features across Angular frontend and Spring Boot microservices
Integrated PostgreSQL schemas with complex query optimization for reporting module
Delivered REST API contracts collaborating with 4 backend engineers
Achieved 85%+ test coverage using Jest + Cypress across assigned modules
Built Angular SaaS platform from scratch, launching with zero critical bugs
Implemented reusable component library reducing development time by 30%
Integrated CI/CD pipeline with SonarQube quality gates enforcing code standards
Built and shipped Flutter mobile application rated 4.2/5 on app stores
Scaled web platform architecture to serve 2,000+ active users
Delivered onboarding documentation using AI tools, reducing ramp-up time by 50%
Contributed across Angular frontend, Node.js backend, and Flutter mobile tracks

ai.label: // 05 AI Engineering
ai.description: I use AI the way an architect uses structural analysis — as a precision tool I understand deeply, supervise carefully, and deploy strategically. The result: faster delivery without sacrificing quality or ownership.

capabilities.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
capabilities.desc: I design and supervise multi-agent workflows where specialized AI agents handle distinct tasks — research, generation, validation — orchestrated by a central controller I architect.

capabilities.title: TDD Acceleration
capabilities.desc: AI-assisted test-driven development: generate test scaffolding, edge cases, and mocks in seconds. Then I review, refine, and own the quality bar.

capabilities.title: Auto-Documentation
capabilities.desc: Reduce onboarding time by 50% using AI agents that generate accurate technical documentation from codebases, architecture diagrams, and PR history.

capabilities.title: Prompt Engineering
capabilities.desc: Precision prompting that extracts production-quality output. I treat prompts as code: versioned, tested, optimized for consistency across generations.

contact.marqueeText: LET'S WORK · AVAILABLE NOW · LET'S WORK · AVAILABLE NOW ·

finale.mailBody: Hey Qaiss — I played through every section of your portfolio. Let's talk.
finale.statusLine: ✓ ALL SYSTEMS GREEN — Dev Quest complete (LVL {level})
finale.body: You explored every corner and cleared all four challenges. That curiosity is exactly what I bring to engineering. Here's a fast-track to my inbox — subject line's already written.

projects.name: Passeport Maroc
projects.description: Citizen-facing passport service integrated with national partners — DGSN for secure citizen identity data and TGR for online payment processing. Built on a reusable component architecture and store patterns adopted as the team standard across squads, with SonarQube gates enforcing code quality on every delivery.

projects.name: Elivret
projects.description: Production Angular platform with advanced NgRx state management and OnPush change detection for large-scale UIs. Integrates the same national services stack (DGSN identity, TGR payments) with SonarQube quality gates on every release.

projects.name: healthcare Platform Nabady
projects.description: Greenfield Angular SaaS launched with zero critical bugs, a reusable component library, and CI/CD quality gates via SonarQube.

projects.name: Flutter Mobile App
projects.description: Cross-platform Flutter app rated 4.2/5, backed by a web platform scaled to serve 2,000+ active users.

projects.name: Reporting Module
projects.description: Angular + Spring Boot reporting module with optimized PostgreSQL queries and 85%+ test coverage across Jest and Cypress.
